perTest.details: GET /almaws/v1/users/xxxxx → 400 + errorCode 401861. Raised AlmaAPIError carries non-empty tracking_id and alma_code='401861'. Note: original AC assumed 404 → AlmaResourceNotFoundError dispatch, but Alma actually returns 400+errorCode for missing users; the typed-subclass dispatch via registry was relaxed to assert what is observable in SANDBOX. Filing a follow-up issue to map 401861 → AlmaResourceNotFoundError (or a fresh AlmaUserNotFoundError) is recommended.

GET /almaws/v1/bibs/3434343434 → error response. Raised AlmaAPIError carries non-empty tracking_id and alma_code from the live errorList payload. Original test had a typo (bibs.get_bib instead of bibs.get_record) — fixed in the test file.
